prompt: Overhead product photograph of premium business cards on a dark slate stone surface. The cards are 600gsm matte black stock with gold foil stamping. The front face features a debossed rectangular double-line border frame containing 'LK' in monospace typeface medium weight centred in the upper area, a thin horizontal divider line beneath, and 'DESIGN AND BUILD' in lighter monospace below the divider. Small corner registration marks at each corner of the rectangle. Tiny 'DWG-001' annotation outside the top-right corner. The entire logo design resembles an architectural drawing title block, stamped in gold foil with tactile debossing. The reverse of one card is visible showing contact details laid out in neat monospace columns with gold foil text on black. Several cards arranged in an artful scattered composition. Shot overhead on 50mm macro lens at f/2.8, studio lighting, photorealistic, luxury branding photography.
negative_prompt: cheap, cartoon, blurry, distorted text, misspelled, bright colours, cluttered
